docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,515.37 FILED BY SEDAN OPERATORS COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA DE SOTO CAB CO., A CORP. R/O AS TO DEFENDANT MCKNIGHT, UNLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
